plan_type_rationale: Test-only addition. No production code changes. Single execution phase.

phases.title: Write and verify unit tests for currentScopeCodeRefId

tasks.description: Review existing call-resolution test patterns in __tests__/pipeline/call-resolution-determinism.test.ts and call-resolution-two-pass-ordering.test.ts for PipelineState construction patterns

Create __tests__/pipeline/call-resolver-current-scope-coderef-id.test.ts covering: (1) null returned at module scope (empty scopeStack), (2) codeRefId from innermost matching scope frame, (3) fallthrough when scopeStack has no matching elements, (4) obj.method() resolves to ClassName.method() via newInitMap when const obj = new ClassName() in enclosing scope
Run npx vitest run __tests__/pipeline/call-resolver-current-scope-coderef-id.test.ts and verify all new tests pass
Run full suite npx vitest run and verify baseline 1496/1526 not regressed (+ new tests)
Commit: test(call-resolver): add unit tests for currentScopeCodeRefId via buildNewInitializerMap pipeline

acceptance_criteria: All main code paths of currentScopeCodeRefId covered: null at module scope, codeRefId from innermost scope, fallthrough
obj.method() resolution via newInitMap verified when const obj = new ClassName() in enclosing scope
